final_result_response:
The Recreation.gov iOS app has been found! Here are the details:

- 📱 **App Name:** Recreation.gov – *Camp, RV, and Explore Outdoors*
- ⭐ **Rating:** 4.9 out of 5 stars (based on 328K ratings)
- 🔗 **App Store URL:** https://apps.apple.com/us/app/recreation-gov/id1353145453

The app allows users to search and reserve campgrounds at national parks and federal recreation sites, filter by amenities or price, view interactive maps and photos, check real-time availability, pay via QR codes, and access digital tickets and existing reservations.

I navigated to recreation.gov → clicked "Learn More" in the mobile app section → was taken to the /mobile-app page → clicked "Download on the App Store" → which opened the Apple App Store page for the Recreation.gov app.
